evals.expected_output: A systematic audit report identifying raw HTML that could be replaced with Bali ViewComponents, with verified API suggestions
expectations: The audit scans app/views/ and app/components/ directories
The audit checks for anti-patterns in existing Bali component usage
The audit identifies raw HTML tables that could use Bali::Table::Component or Bali::DataTable::Component
The audit identifies manual page layouts that could use Bali page components (IndexPage, ShowPage, FormPage, DashboardPage)
The audit verifies component APIs before suggesting replacements (invokes bali-components skill or reads component source)
The audit prioritizes findings by impact level (HIGH for structural, MEDIUM for patterns, LOW for specialized)
The audit does NOT suggest wrong slot names (e.g., does not suggest with_body for Card or with_footer for Modal)
The audit runs in a forked context (isolated from conversation history)

evals.prompt: Find raw HTML to replace with ViewComponents in app/views/admin/
evals.expected_output: A scoped audit of the admin views directory
expectations: The audit scopes to app/views/admin/ only
The audit identifies forms missing Bali::FormBuilder
The audit identifies raw HTML that has Bali component equivalents
Each suggestion includes the current code and the proposed Bali replacement
